title: Close ARCHITECTURE.md gaps — document store, embed, adapters, profiler, sox modules
description: Architecture match is 85% with 5 undocumented modules. Add proper sections to ARCHITECTURE.md for: 1) src/store/index.js (KV storage wrapper, get/set/del/delete exports) — status: missing/major, 2) src/runtime/embed.js + src/runtime/adapters/ (embed.js, sense.js, voice/*.js) — status: partial/major, 3) src/runtime/sense.js full API (init/on/start/stop/detect/startWakeWordPipeline etc) — status: partial/minor, 4) src/runtime/profiler.js + src/runtime/latency-log.js — status: missing/minor, 5) src/detector/sox.js + src/cli/download-state.js — status: missing/minor. Previous task task-1775849914280 was marked done but gaps remain. Target: architecture match ≥90%.
